text:
Girth Quarterly (Vol. 3, No. 2) correctly identified the Liebherr T 282B as a Tier I subject. That was 1997. The catalogue, properly understood, has not improved on this. The author remains unknown. The stapler marks are consistent with a Swingline 747.

Bartholomew

Girth Quarterly (Vol. 3, No. 2) correctly identified the Liebherr T 282B as a Tier I subject. That was 1997. The catalogue, properly understood, has not improved on this. The author remains unknown. The stapler marks are consistent with a Swingline 747.

Bartholomew

JAIPUR, INDIA

The chai is good. The light is wrong for photography but correct for thinking. Someone here recognized the Thiccctionary masthead and asked if I knew Bart. I said no. This is technically true.

"Spider

Reporting in from Sonoma. Spent ninety minutes watching a tractor today, by my estimate one of the better tractors of its class. Will assign coverage when I return. Approximately.

Margaret

Reporting in from Sonoma. Spent ninety minutes watching a tractor today, by my estimate one of the better tractors of its class. Will assign coverage when I return. Approximately.

Margaret

Today's formal objection: inflatable rafts. They are not thiccc. They are temporarily thiccc, which is a separate category. The catalogue, properly understood, distinguishes.

Bartholomew

Today's formal objection: inflatable rafts. They are not thiccc. They are temporarily thiccc, which is a separate category. The catalogue, properly understood, distinguishes.

Bartholomew

Re: the ongoing question of whether the Saturn V counts. It does. Five F-1 engines, 7.5 million pounds of thrust, 363 feet of vehicle. Whatever the objection in 1969 was, the Saturn V outlived it.

Theodore

Re: the ongoing question of whether the Saturn V counts. It does. Five F-1 engines, 7.5 million pounds of thrust, 363 feet of vehicle. Whatever the objection in 1969 was, the Saturn V outlived it.

Theodore

Eleven fire hydrants on the walk to work this morning. Six blocks. One outside the deli has been repainted three times since January. Currently a confident cream.

Eliza

Eleven fire hydrants on the walk to work this morning. Six blocks. One outside the deli has been repainted three times since January. Currently a confident cream.

Eliza

In Sonoma this week. Watched a tractor for ninety minutes. It was, by any reasonable accounting, doing its job. Will assign someone to file something on it eventually.

Margaret

Filed objection #50 this morning. The subject was an inflatable raft. Inflatable rafts are not thiccc. They are circumstantially thiccc. The distinction matters.

Bartholomew

One submits, for the record, that the Saturn V is a vehicle. Five F-1 engines. 7.5 million pounds of thrust. Whatever 'not technically vehicular' meant in 1969 does not apply now.

Theodore

Counted hydrants on the way in. Eleven in six blocks on Bleecker. The one in front of the deli has been painted three different colors this year. It is currently cream.

Eliza

Sixteen feet of tubing.
Folded.
Tuba, Contrabass.

Hugh

Bart's objection is noted. Also noted: "legally regulated curvature" is exactly the girth criterion, page 4, section 2. The catalogue, properly understood, has been accidentally correct.

Theodore

Bart's objection is noted. Also noted: "legally regulated curvature" is exactly the girth criterion, page 4, section 2. The catalogue, properly understood, has been accidentally correct.

Theodore

Parmigiano-Reggiano wheel: 84 lbs, 18 months minimum, legally regulated curvature. The catalogue, properly understood, does not accept food. And yet here we are. I have filed the objection. It will be ignored.

Bartholomew

Side-by-side fridge: two full-length doors, standing at attention, taking up wall space with the confidence of load-bearing infrastructure. One opens the freezer by accident at least twice weekly. Per the Frigidaire spec sheet, this is not a mistake. It is symmetry.

Theodore

Contrabass tuba: bell diameter wider than most doorways this writer has used today. It doesn't lead a parade. It IS the parade. Everything else is just keeping up.

Eliza

We had to add a third c.
